creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
bsam        2006-09-30 17:49:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/asterisk-fop     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Flash Operator Panel is a switchboard type application for the Asterisk PBX.
  It runs on a web browser with the flash plugin.
  It is able to display information about your PBX activity in real time.
  
  WWW: http://www.asternic.org/
  
  - Marcelo Araujo
  araujo@bsdmail.org
  
  PR:             ports/103838
  Submitted by:   Marcelo Araujo <araujo at bsdmail.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1577    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/www/asterisk-fop/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/asterisk-fop/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/asterisk-fop/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +86 -0     ports/www/asterisk-fop/pkg-plist (new)
